first_year.no_enrollment_deposit: UIC does not charge an enrollment deposit.

transfer.minimum_credits: 24 transferable hours at application, 36 by enrollment
transfer.community_college_pathway: Guaranteed Admission Transfer at tag.uic.edu with 3.0 GPA

readmission.process: Apply via UIC web application, submit transcripts, letter of petition

international.transcript_note: ATA-certified translations required for non-English documents
international.english_proficiency_note: Accepted tests: TOEFL (min 80 iBT), IELTS (min 6.5), Duolingo English Test (min 105). Exemptions: native English speakers, students from English-medium institutions, US high school graduates.

admitted_next_steps.intent_to_enroll: First-year: May 1 (fall), Dec 1 (spring). Transfer: June 1 (fall), Dec 1 (spring)
admitted_next_steps.placement_tests: Complete before June 30 for fall admits

aspire_grant.amount: 100% tuition and fees for Illinois families under $75,000
